<settings>
  <servers>
    <server>
      <id>active-repo</id>
      <username>active-user</username>
      <password>active-pass</password>
    </server>
    <server>
      <id>inactive-repo</id>
      <username>inactive-user</username>
      <password>inactive-pass</password>
    </server>
  </servers>
  <profiles>
    <profile>
      <id>active</id>
      <repositories>
        <repository>
          <id>active-repo</id>
          <url>https://active.example.test/maven</url>
        </repository>
      </repositories>
    </profile>
    <profile>
      <id>inactive</id>
      <repositories>
        <repository>
          <id>inactive-repo</id>
          <url>https://inactive.example.test/maven</url>
        </repository>
      </repositories>
    </profile>
  </profiles>
  <activeProfiles>
    <activeProfile>active</activeProfile>
  </activeProfiles>
</settings>
